title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 65.270 - Corporate power, limitations of
text:
65.270.  Corporate power, limitations of. — No township shall possess any corporate powers, except such as are enumerated or granted by this chapter, or shall be specially given by law, or shall be necessary to the exercise of the powers so enumerated or granted.
(RSMo 1939 § 13934) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12257; 1919 § 13170; 1909 § 11658
